defmodule Acc do  @spec sum_to(pos_integer) :: integer
  @doc """
  Computes the sum of the first n natural numbers.
  """
  def sum_to(n) do
    Enum.reduce(1..n, 0, +)
  end
end

  end
end

defmodule Acc do  @spec sum_to(integer n) :: integer
  @doc """
  Computes the sum of the first n natural numbers.
  """
  def sum_to(n) do
    Enum.reduce(1..n, 0, &1)
  end
end

defmodule Vowels
  def count(string) do
    vowels = "aeiou"
    string
    |> String.downcase()
    |> Enum.count(&1 in vowels)
  end
end

defmodule Stack do
  def push(stack, value) do
    [value | stack]
  end

  def pop(stack) do
    {value, stack} = stack
  end

  def size(stack) do
    Enum.length(stack)
 end
end

 end

defmodule Stack do
  def push(stack, value) do
    [value | stack]
  end

  def pop(stack) do
    {value, stack} = stack
  end

  def size(stack) do
    length(stack)
  ends
end
